summary: Footage of a White House event. A woman in a white jacket speaks at a lectern bearing the presidential seal while Trump in a dark suit and blue tie stands beside her; US flags and a paneled wall are behind them. A lower-third reads 'TEXT POTUS TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE / THE WHITE HOUSE.' The audio is a speaker and Trump at a ceremony for families who lost relatives to crimes involving illegal immigration. The tweet text refers to Angel Families.

script.scene: Woman in a white jacket speaks at a lectern with the presidential seal; Trump stands beside her; chyron 'TEXT POTUS TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE.'
